page_metadata.bioconda__license: PIPmiR is provided for academic use only, if you wish to use it in another setting please contact Uwe Ohler.
page_metadata.bioconda__summary: We developed the PIPmiR algorithm to identify novel plant miRNA genes from a combination of deep sequencing data and genomic features.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: We developed the PIPmiR algorithm to identify novel plant miRNA
